title: Improve io.open Error Messages Using vim.uv.fs_open
summary:
Fixed vim.uv.fs_open implementation in state.lua by replacing Lua 5.1 incompatible bitwise OR operator (|) with bit.bor() function. The implementation includes:

- ERROR_MESSAGES table mapping error codes to human-readable messages (EACCES→"Permission denied", ENOENT→"Directory does not exist", etc.)
- vim.uv.fs_open with O_RDONLY flag for load() operations
- vim.uv.fs_open with O_WRONLY|O_CREAT|O_TRUNC flags (using bit.bor) for save() operations
- Proper file descriptor lifecycle management with vim.uv.fs_close()
- Specific error messages instead of generic "could not write" messages

All 51 state tests pass successfully.
